title: Chibblemon Season 2
description: The (not so) critically acclaimed sequel to season one of the Chibidoki based cobblemon pack! Join the community for this one of a kind experience with your friends!
body:
The (not so) critically acclaimed Chibidoki based cobblemon modpack is back for season 2! Not only is it back but it's back and better than ever before!!!

So much has been added and changed in this pack from better generated structures, to 99%* dex completion (didn't actually count :c), to trainer NPCs AND MORE!

If I talked about all the features that I fixed you'd spend so much time reading it you wouldn't have enough time to read (plus it would be boring and I know the people who are here from chat don't know how to read for long periods) so hop on in to this thrilling sequel!
